source: Unreal Engine 5.8 — PetoskeyCivicBowl CivicBowl.umap, Game View captures via the ModelContextProtocol plugin (EditorAppToolset.CaptureViewport)
scene_state: GIS-first nested context build: full OSM+Microsoft city massing with 99% LiDAR-measured (3DEP) building heights, width-graded draped streets, foreground 3DEP terrain, accepted bowl design untouched; crude bay/horizon proxies hidden.
note: Real perspective renders of the live editor scene, persisted so the web viewer can show the latest rendered scene. Refresh by re-capturing from the editor and re-running scripts/build_viewer_renders.py. NOTE: this gallery now spans TWO capture sessions — frames 01-07 are the 2026-06-25 nested-context study (umap_sha256 above); frames 08-10 are the 2026-07-04 adopted-P_opt-deck stage-audit re-import (see sessions[]).

sessions.scene_state: Phase-B adopted P_opt stage deck re-imported from the artifact pipeline (Method B deck-over-compacted-base): 70x34 core + five-facet apron + non-governing shoulders at the P_opt position; orchestra re-emitted (overlap 0); inherited placeholder removed. Read-only capture — no UE geometry hand-edited.
sessions.note: Captured via EditorAppToolset.CaptureViewport under the graded golden-hour review lighting; verified 0 Stage_zone* placeholders / 4 Stage_adopted* actors.
